promotion_rule: the factory assembly drawing establishes C38/C42/C46/C50 refdes, placement, and original population; the complete target view plus the owner-board site morphology establishes assembly DNP for the other 27 inherited grid footprints; no source establishes capacitance value or electrical connectivity

factory_drawing.coordinate_precision: reviewed approximate label centres and enclosing boxes; refdes/row identity evidence, not a photogrammetric board-coordinate fit
factory_drawing.observation: the .009 assembly drawing labels four horizontal capacitor bodies above the populated D91-D84 DRAM row; the labels align with every other package, C38 over D91, C42 over D89, C46 over D87, and C50 over D85

legacy_grid_mapping.observation: the older .006 assembly drawing maps a complete 4x8 DRAM-field zigzag; this source is used only to identify the optional bare footprint refdes inherited by the common 7.102.158 artwork, never to promote target-revision population

owner_board.coordinate_precision: reviewed approximate enclosing boxes; removal/population evidence, not electrical endpoint coordinates
owner_board.observation: the populated D91-D84 bank fixes the same four sites; each site has a coherent horizontal landing pair with solder and clipped lead remnants but no capacitor body, consistent with post-factory precious-metal removal rather than a factory DNP
owner_board.optional_grid_observation: D60-D83 are bare expansion footprints and the other DRAM-field capacitor sites have clean tinned landings without fitted bodies or clipped component leads; the four populated-row remnant sites remain visually distinct

sites.population_state: body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained

target_optional_grid_dnp.population_state: assembly DNP; retain the fabricated two-pad footprint
target_optional_grid_dnp.basis: the complete .009 target assembly view labels only C38/C42/C46/C50 in the DRAM field, while the owner board shows the remaining inherited .006 grid sites as clean bare tinned landings
target_optional_grid_dnp.boundary: the old .006 mapping preserves refdes-to-footprint working coordinates, but those coordinates remain old-revision placement evidence rather than a target photogrammetric fit

population_disposition: populate all four in the exact factory-assembly replica; the surviving owner board records later removal, not the original build state
